trans-unit.source: When enabled, each payment method appears as a separate option at checkout. When disabled, all methods are shown in a single Nexi Checkout option.
trans-unit.target: When enabled, each payment method appears as a separate option at checkout. When disabled, all methods are shown in a single Nexi Checkout option.

trans-unit.source: Configure which payment methods are available and their display order (only active when payment method splitting is enabled)
trans-unit.target: Configure which payment methods are available and their display order (only active when payment method splitting is enabled)

trans-unit.source: Drag to reorder • Toggle to enable/disable
trans-unit.target: Drag to reorder • Toggle to enable/disable

trans-unit.source: No payment methods available. Please check your API credentials and reload the page.
trans-unit.target: No payment methods available. Please check your API credentials and reload the page.
